title: BridgeEventEnvelope
description: Standard envelope for Atlas Bridge WebSocket event streams. Mirrors the BridgeEventEnvelope struct in Shared/AtlasBridgeContract/include/AtlasBridgeTypes.h.

protocolVersion.description: Bridge protocol version string reported by the server.

eventId.description: Server-assigned UUID that uniquely identifies this event.

sessionId.description: Session UUID of the session that triggered or is subscribed to this event.

service.description: Service that emitted the event, e.g. "BuildService", "EditorService".

timestampUtc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the event was emitted by the server.

payload.description: Optional service-specific event data. Schema is defined per service/eventType.
